nasb.text: Their number who were trained in singing to the Lord, with their relatives, all who were skillful, was 288.

esv.text: The number of them along with their brothers, who were trained in singing to the Lord, all who were skillful, was 288.

cnv.text: 他們和他們的親族，在歌頌耶和華的事上受過特別訓練，精於歌唱的，人數共有二百八十八人。

ccb.text: 他们和其他训练有素、负责歌颂耶和华的亲族共有二百八十八人。
